prompt: Minimalist modern cultural logo on black background. The letters MM are designed as two tall vertical pillars or columns — like Roman or Greek architectural columns simplified to their most minimal geometric form. Clean straight white lines, no ornamental details, just the pure structural essence of classical columns forming the letter M shapes. A single horizontal cyan (#00E3FF) beam connects the two columns at the top, like a lintel or bridge. Below, 'MM AGENCY.' in clean geometric sans-serif, all caps, wide spacing, with cyan dot. The design bridges classical civilization aesthetics with ultra-modern minimalism — strength, permanence, structure. Vector quality, razor sharp, centered on matte black.
